title: Validate The PRD
artifact_policy: Review the pipeline artifact. Do not require sidecar paperwork files.

quality_checks.criteria: PRD shows the learner evaluated whether the pain is real using user/customer evidence, workflow observation, public-thread analysis, or serious outreach attempts
PRD explains what alternatives do well, what gaps remain, and what the product should learn from them
ICP is specific enough to find, contact, and interview
TAM/SAM/SOM notes distinguish assumptions from facts and identify a reachable SOM
PRD clearly separates the full product vision from the first MVP and keeps the MVP focused on the core user value
PRD changes or Keep verdict are tied to validation evidence
